message:
Improve CLI log filtering and preflight banner query performance

Add mvcc=warn, checkpoint=warn, fsqlite.storage_wiring=warn to default
release log filter. Remove COALESCE() wrappers from preflight banner
MAX() queries to stay on FrankenSQLite's fast aggregate path and avoid
mixed aggregate/non-aggregate planner edge-cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
